summary: Complete testing of AI Village: The Echoes P0 systems - Skills & Titles, Entity Earnings (VE$), AI Autonomy, and World Instances. All 22 backend tests passed after fixing MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues. Frontend Skills Page loads correctly with all 6 categories and 31 titles.
passed_tests: GET /api/skill-system/catalog - Returns 6 categories (combat, magic, crafting, gathering, social, knowledge)
GET /api/skill-system/catalog - Returns 30 total skills (5 per category)
GET /api/skill-system/catalog - Returns 25+ action mappings for skill XP gains
GET /api/skill-system/titles/catalog - Returns 31 titles with requirements and boosts
POST /api/skill-system/action - Awards XP for actions (attack_melee -> swordsmanship)
POST /api/skill-system/action - Difficulty multiplier affects XP gained
GET /api/entity-earnings/wallet/npc/{id} - Creates NPC wallet (AI can earn VE$)
GET /api/ai-autonomy/npc/{id}/state - Returns NPC state with personality traits
GET /api/worlds/types - Returns 4 world types and 8 story characters
GET /api/worlds/story/main - Returns main story world with 8 original characters
frontend_tests_passed: All 6 category buttons present (Combat, Magic, Crafting, Gathering, Social, Knowledge)
Skills tab shows 5 skills per category with XP progress bars
Titles tab shows all 31 titles with requirements and stat boosts
Active Title section displays current title (or 'No Title')
Total Points section shows accumulated skill points
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in entity_earnings_router.py, ai_autonomy_router.py, and world_instances_router.py
Skills router correctly uses /api/skill-system prefix to avoid conflicts
Entity earnings allows both players AND NPCs to earn VE$ (fiat currency)
AI Autonomy system includes personality traits, free will, and autonomous actions
World instances support private (Sirix-1), shared, story, and instance types
Story world has 8 original characters: Elder Morvain, Lyra the Wanderer, Oracle Veythra, Kael Ironbrand, Archivist Nyx, Innkeeper Mara, The Grove Keeper, Sentinel Theron

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Skills Page loads correctly with all features)

seed_data_creation: Test entities created: TEST_player_skill_action, TEST_player_wallet_123, TEST_npc_wallet_456, TEST_autonomous_npc, TEST_npc_initiator, TEST_npc_target
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 systems fully tested and working: 1) Skills system at /api/skill-system/* with 6 categories, 30 skills, 31 titles. 2) Entity earnings at /api/entity-earnings/* allows both players and NPCs to earn VE$ (fiat currency). 3) AI Autonomy at /api/ai-autonomy/* enables NPC personality, free will, and AI-to-AI conversations. 4) World instances at /api/worlds/* support private (Sirix-1 exclusive), shared, story (8 original characters), and instance types. LLM responses for NPC conversations have fallback to personality-based responses.

mocked_apis.AI-to-AI Conversations: LLM responses fall back to personality-based responses if LLM fails
